de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class TacletIndex.PrefixOccurrences

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex.PrefixOccurrences
  • Enclosing class:
    TacletIndex

    private static class TacletIndex.PrefixOccurrences
extends Object
    Inner class to track the occurrences of prefix elements in java blocks

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      (package private) static int[] nextChild
      fields to indicate the position of the next relevant child (the next possible prefix element or real statement
      private boolean[] occurred
      field that marks iff the prefix elements have already occurred
      (package private) static Class<?>[] prefixClasses
      the classes that represent prefix elements of a java block
      (package private) static int PREFIXTYPES
      number of prefix types

      Constructor and Description
      PrefixOccurrences()

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getList(HashMap<Object,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> map)
      creates a selection of the given NoPosTacletApp map that comply with the occurred prefix elements
      int occurred(ProgramElement pe)
      notification that the given program element has occurred.
      void reset()
      resets the occurred field to 'nothing has occurred'

      • prefixClasses

        static final Class<?>[] prefixClasses
        the classes that represent prefix elements of a java block

      • PREFIXTYPES

        static final int PREFIXTYPES
        number of prefix types

      • occurred

        private final boolean[] occurred
        field that marks iff the prefix elements have already occurred

        static final int[] nextChild
        fields to indicate the position of the next relevant child (the next possible prefix element or real statement

      • PrefixOccurrences

    • Method Detail

      • reset

        public void reset()
        resets the occurred field to 'nothing has occurred'

      • occurred

        public int occurred(ProgramElement pe)
        notification that the given program element has occurred. The occurred fields are subsequently set.
        Parameters:
        pe - the occurred program element
        Returns:
        the number of the next possible prefix element

      • getList

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getList(HashMap<Object,ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp>> map)
        creates a selection of the given NoPosTacletApp map that comply with the occurred prefix elements
        Parameters:
        map - a map to select from
